item.title: TikTokMod [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: TikTokMod [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: dim4ugan
item.itunes:summary:
TikTokMod
(Chat & Messenging)
- Removed all ads
- Made video, GIFs downloading without watermark to Movies/TikTok folder instead of DCIM/Camera and pictures to Pictures/TikTok
- Removed all restrictions on downloads, you can download any video
- Removed many other restrictions
- Disabled unnecessary activities
- Removed restrictions on duets, stitching
- Rewind is now available in any video
- Battery drain optimization
- Removed regional restrictions
- Fixed Google authorization
- Fixed Facebook authorization
- Fixed Twitter authorization
- Enabled High Quality Audio for live steams
- Enabled High Quality Video for live streams
- Enabled HD Video upload button
- Disabled InAppBillingService
- Disabled all types of Analytics
- Disabled mandatory login
- Added author tag for the name of the downloaded file
- Added ability to download profile pictures
- Monet app icon for Android 13+
- Added playback speed selection button for all videos
- Changed the friends tab to discover as it was before
- Disabled data collection and sending to the TikTok server
- Added autoscroll button on FYP page
- Added partly dark mode which can be turned on if u use specific firmwares like MIUI/HyperOS
- Bypassing the prohibition to record the screen of live stream, the author of which prohibited to do it (previously it was a black screen)
- Bypassing the 60 second limit for live stream (When you attend a stream TikTok gives you 60 seconds to preview the live stream, after that the live stream only works for subscribers)
[read more]
item.description:
TikTokMod
(Chat & Messenging)
- Removed all ads
- Made video, GIFs downloading without watermark to Movies/TikTok folder instead of DCIM/Camera and pictures to Pictures/TikTok
- Removed all restrictions on downloads, you can download any video
- Removed many other restrictions
- Disabled unnecessary activities
- Removed restrictions on duets, stitching
- Rewind is now available in any video
- Battery drain optimization
- Removed regional restrictions
- Fixed Google authorization
- Fixed Facebook authorization
- Fixed Twitter authorization
- Enabled High Quality Audio for live steams
- Enabled High Quality Video for live streams
- Enabled HD Video upload button
- Disabled InAppBillingService
- Disabled all types of Analytics
- Disabled mandatory login
- Added author tag for the name of the downloaded file
- Added ability to download profile pictures
- Monet app icon for Android 13+
- Added playback speed selection button for all videos
- Changed the friends tab to discover as it was before
- Disabled data collection and sending to the TikTok server
- Added autoscroll button on FYP page
- Added partly dark mode which can be turned on if u use specific firmwares like MIUI/HyperOS
- Bypassing the prohibition to record the screen of live stream, the author of which prohibited to do it (previously it was a black screen)
- Bypassing the 60 second limit for live stream (When you attend a stream TikTok gives you 60 seconds to preview the live stream, after that the live stream only works for subscribers)
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
TikTokMod
(Chat & Messenging)
- Removed all ads
- Made video, GIFs downloading without watermark to Movies/TikTok folder instead of DCIM/Camera and pictures to Pictures/TikTok
- Removed all restrictions on downloads, you can download any video
- Removed many other restrictions
- Disabled unnecessary activities
- Removed restrictions on duets, stitching
- Rewind is now available in any video
- Battery drain optimization
- Removed regional restrictions
- Fixed Google authorization
- Fixed Facebook authorization
- Fixed Twitter authorization
- Enabled High Quality Audio for live steams
- Enabled High Quality Video for live streams
- Enabled HD Video upload button
- Disabled InAppBillingService
- Disabled all types of Analytics
- Disabled mandatory login
- Added author tag for the name of the downloaded file
- Added ability to download profile pictures
- Monet app icon for Android 13+
- Added playback speed selection button for all videos
- Changed the friends tab to discover as it was before
- Disabled data collection and sending to the TikTok server
- Added autoscroll button on FYP page
- Added partly dark mode which can be turned on if u use specific firmwares like MIUI/HyperOS
- Bypassing the prohibition to record the screen of live stream, the author of which prohibited to do it (previously it was a black screen)
- Bypassing the 60 second limit for live stream (When you attend a stream TikTok gives you 60 seconds to preview the live stream, after that the live stream only works for subscribers)
[read more]

item.title: FaceCheck ID APK 1.0.2 Version Free Download App [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: FaceCheck ID APK 1.0.2 Version Free Download App [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: ghffdhh8
item.itunes:summary:
FaceCheck ID APK 1.0.2 Version Free Download App
(Various Games)
Unveiling FaceCheck ID APK 1.0.2: Your Comprehensive Guide
In the ever-evolving landscape of digital security, innovation remains the hallmark of progress. Among the myriad solutions surfacing to safeguard our virtual identities, FaceCheck ID APK 1.0.2 emerges as a beacon of promise, combining cutting-edge facial recognition technology with seamless user experience. As seasoned tech enthusiasts and guardians of cybernetic advancements, we delve into the depths of this revolutionary application to unveil its intricacies and potentials.

Understanding FaceCheck ID APK 1.0.2
At its core, FaceCheck ID APK 1.0.2 epitomizes the fusion of convenience and security. Designed to empower users with a frictionless authentication process, this application leverages advanced facial recognition algorithms to ensure swift and reliable identity verification. With a streamlined interface and intuitive controls, it caters to both tech-savvy individuals and those new to digital authentication, making it a versatile tool for a diverse user base.

item.title: Gacha Nox APK 1.3.1 For Android Latest Version Download Game [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Gacha Nox APK 1.3.1 For Android Latest Version Download Game [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: ghffdhh8
item.itunes:summary:
Gacha Nox APK 1.3.1 For Android Latest Version Download Game
(Various Games)
In today's mobile gaming world, Gacha Nox APK 1.3.1 has become a household name. With millions of players worldwide, this game has sparked a frenzy with its gacha system, engaging gameplay, and stunning graphics. In this article, we will delve into the details of Gacha Nox APK version 1.3.1, evaluating its standout features and advantages.
Review:

Gacha Nox APK 1.3.1 is not just a simple entertainment game; it's a challenging and captivating experience. While maintaining its gacha gameplay, this new version has brought significant updates and improvements, from performance enhancements to the addition of new features.

Standout Features:

Diverse Gacha System: Gacha Nox APK 1.3.1 continues to uphold a diverse gacha system with hundreds of characters and items to collect. This diversity creates excitement and desire for collecting and upgrading.
Stunning Graphics: With beautiful 2D graphics and special effects, Gacha Nox APK 1.3.1 is truly a masterpiece on mobile. Each character and skill is meticulously designed, creating a vibrant and appealing world.
Rich Gameplay Modes: This game not only offers simple gameplay modes but also includes various rich gameplay modes such as PvP battles, PvE, cross-server competitions, and weekly special events.
Regular Updates: The developers of Gacha Nox continuously update and add new content to ensure players never feel bored. Version 1.3.1 has brought many new features and bug fixes, improving the player experience.
Advantages:

[read more]

item.itunes:author: ghffdhh8
item.itunes:summary:
Aviator Predictor APK v4.0 For Android Free Download
(Various Games)
In today's world, mobile technology is rapidly advancing, providing us with unprecedented convenience and accuracy. In the realm of travel and flight journeys, Aviator Predictor APK v4.0 has proven to be an app worth the frequent flyer's attention.
Notable Progress
Aviator Predictor APK v4.0 is not just another routine update; it represents a significant leap forward in enhancing user experience. With this new version, users can expect to experience notable features and enhancements:

Accurate Predictions
One of the standout features of Aviator Predictor v4.0 is its ability to accurately predict flight times and statuses. This allows users to plan effectively and avoid unwanted risks.

User-Friendly Interface
With a redesigned interface that is both intuitive and user-friendly, Aviator Predictor APK v4.0 makes it easy for users to navigate and utilize its features efficiently.

item.title: Undress AI APK 1.1 Download Latest Version For Android [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Undress AI APK 1.1 Download Latest Version For Android [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: ghffdhh8
item.itunes:summary:
Undress AI APK 1.1 Download Latest Version For Android
(Various Games)
Undress App APK 1.1" is a creative entertainment app designed for users on mobile platforms. Leveraging augmented reality and machine learning technology, this app offers a unique experience, allowing users to "undress" or "dress up" virtual layers of clothing on their images.
Key Features:

Undress Virtual Clothing: Users can select photos from their gallery or take new ones and then use this feature to remove virtual layers of clothing on the image, creating an impression similar to real undressing.
Add Virtual Clothing: In addition to undressing, users can also add virtual layers of clothing to their images from a diverse collection, ranging from sportswear to elaborate costumes.
Customization: The app provides graphic editing tools for users to customize and adjust virtual clothing to fit their body shape and position on the image.
Sharing and Storage: Users can share edited photos on social media platforms or directly store them on their mobile devices.
[read more]

item.itunes:author: gfdgd5
item.itunes:summary:
iMeetzu APK 1.0.2 Download For Android Latest Version
(Various Games)
In our modern world, connecting with others through the internet has become an indispensable part of daily life. From chatting with friends overseas to meeting new people, connection apps have become an integral part of how we interact with the world around us. Among these, iMeetzu stands out, and its latest APK version, 1.0.2, brings many improvements and attractive features.
The Emergence of iMeetzu
iMeetzu is not your ordinary connection app. It's not just a place to chat but also a platform that allows you to meet and interact with people worldwide. With a mission to create an open and friendly community, iMeetzu quickly garnered the attention of millions of users worldwide.

item.title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: detlev
item.itunes:summary:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.description:
eric
(IDEs)

It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]

eric

Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
